resources:
Tempo
Tempo is tracking your music Listening for music playback… Now tracking: %1$s - %2$s
Set Up Tempo Tempo needs a couple of permissions to track your music listening in the background. Notification Access Tempo reads music notifications to detect what songs you\'re playing. This works with YouTube Music, Spotify, and other music apps.\n\nWe only read music-related notifications and never access your personal messages or other notifications. Grant Access Granted ✓ Battery Optimization To reliably track your music in the background, Tempo needs to be excluded from battery optimization.\n\nThis prevents Android from stopping Tempo when you\'re listening to music. Tempo is designed to use minimal battery. Disable Optimization Disabled ✓ Start Tracking Complete Setup Above 🔒 All your data stays on your device. Tempo never uploads your listening history.
✅ Music tracking active Play music in YouTube Music, Spotify, or any other music app. Tempo will automatically track your listening. Home Your Signal Settings
Today\'s listening stats at a glance Shows your top artist statistics Overview of your music listening stats Discover new music based on your taste Visualize your listening patterns over time Track your listening milestones Your personalized music mix
Tempo Spotlight See your music visualised. Your Week in Review Listen Time New Finds Top Artist On Repeat Ready to discover? Found %1$d new artists Expand your musical horizon Discovered %1$d new tracks Fresh beats for your playlist Variety Score: %1$d/10 How unique is your taste? A Look at Your Habits LVL
Enjoying Tempo? If you like using the app, please take a moment to rate it. It really helps us grow! Rate Now Not Now
LEVEL %1$d %1$d XP Next: %1$d XP LEVEL UP! Level %1$d Awesome! You reached Level %1$d
Know Your Music, Love Your Stats Tempo automatically tracks what you listen to and shows you beautiful insights about your listening habits. Get Started Skip
Here\'s How It Works No login. No account. Just music. You play music Spotify, YouTube Music, or any app Notification appears Tempo reads only music info Stats saved locally On your phone, nowhere else 20+ apps 100% local Auto-tracks Next
Your Data Stays Here Privacy isn\'t a feature. It\'s the foundation. 100% Local Storage All data stays on your phone. Always. No Servers, No Cloud We have no backend. Zero data uploaded. Music Notifications Only We read Spotify, YouTube Music, etc. Never messages. Open Source Check our code anytime on GitHub. "We can\'t see your data. We don\'t want to." Got It
One more thing for better accuracy Let Tempo run in the background for continuous tracking. This ensures we don\'t miss any songs while your screen is off. Optimize Skip for now
Data Preferences Choose how much data Tempo uses for audio analysis Basic Analysis Genre and mood from database lookup Fast • No data download Extended Audio Analysis [EXPERIMENTAL] Detailed mood & energy from 30s audio preview ~500KB per track • More accurate Smart Merge Versions Treat Live/Remix versions as the same song for cleaner history Recommended for cleaner stats You can change this anytime in Settings Continue
One Permission Needed This is how Tempo sees what you\'re playing MUSIC ONLY Spotify, YouTube,\n& essentially any\nmusic player PRIVATE DATA We ignore chats,\nOTPs, emails, and\neverything else Enable Notification Access I\'ll do this later Runs efficiently in background • No battery drain
✓ Tempo works with any music app! Get High-Quality Art Connect to use Spotify\'s reliable database for metadata: Reliable album artwork Accurate genre info Mood & energy stats This is optional. We never access your playlists or personal data. Connect Spotify Skip for now
Import & Restore Import from other services or restore your backup. Import Restore Google Drive Connect Google Account No backups found Restore from File Select a .zip backup file Start Fresh Back Restoring… Processing… Restoring from Cloud… Restore Options How should we handle data conflicts? Replace Everything Skip Duplicates Cancel Restore this backup? Restore Importing from Spotify… Fetching your recent plays Import Complete! Import Failed OK 🕐 Analyzing Your Liked Songs… 📅 Finding Yearly Playlists… 🎵 Collecting Top Tracks… ✨ Creating Your History… Using exact dates from your liked songs Finding Your Top Songs playlists Building from your top tracks Creating realistic listening patterns Building your music history Completing authentication Getting started with your stats Please wait while we cooking your data
Import from Last.fm Import your scrobble history to unlock powerful listening insights Import years of listening history Connect Last.fm Discovering your Last.fm account… Discovering your account… Welcome, %1$s! %1$s total scrobbles Choose Import Level Recommended Recommended: %1$s Cancel Import %1$s of %2$s scrobbles %1$s%% Import Complete! Last.fm History Imported Your complete history is imported. Your Last.fm history is now connected Done This may take a few minutes We\'ll analyze your listening history and import recent scrobbles. Your data stays on your device.
Import from Spotify Connect with Spotify Connect Spotify for\nAdvanced Stats Connect to unlock: Your data stays on your device. We only fetch audio features for tracks you\'ve already listened to. "Note: Spotify\'s API only provides your last ~50 plays. "
Music Tracking Active Quiet week so far We\'re listening, but haven\'t seen any plays yet. Start streaming to see your weekly pulse. Fresh month, fresh start Your history is safe. Play music to spark this month\'s stats. %1$d has begun Your year in review starts now. Keep listening to build your story. No Data Yet Start listening to see your stats here. Getting started with your stats Let\'s get your stats flowing No account connection needed Open Spotify, YouTube Music, or others Play a few songs - stats appear shortly Return here to see your insights Check Supported Apps Play some music to see it here.
Song Details Artist Details Album Details Plays Total Plays Total Time Total Listening Listening Time Times Played Peak Position Release Date Top Albums Top Songs Genre Listen On Tracks Listening Activity Listening Trends Audio Analysis Average Tempo Based on %1$d tracks with audio analysis Estimated Energy Tracks with audio features Pending enrichment Share Preview Merge Artist Merge with… BLOCK ENTIRE ARTIST BLOCK THIS TRACK
Confirm Merge ⚠️ Confirm Merge Merge \"%1$s\" into \"%2$s\"? Merge into \"%1$s\" by %2$s? This action cannot be undone. All listening history will be combined. Merging artists… Search for the correct artist to merge into. All listening history will be combined. Search for the correct track to merge into. All listening history will be combined. Type to search for artists Type to search for tracks Merging: %1$s
Engagement Score Your Engagement
Badges No badges to show %1$d / %2$d collected MAXED UNLOCKED Level Progress Your Listening Personality Your Top Genres
Filter History History is empty Search songs… "Sort by: " Recent Activity
Spotlight Share Story Share to Instagram Stories Loading your cards… No cards available Preparing your story… View Story Your Music %1$s
TOP SONGS THE DAILY ROTATION Your Top Artist Your Top Song Your All-Time Favorite This is your most played song ever. TOP 1%% FAN ★ BREAKING: NEW OBSESSION DETECTED ★ THE DEEP CUT THE HORIZON The Weekly Pulse You listened for back-to-back That\'s over %1$d days non-stop! NEW DISCOVERIES Mood & Genre Circadian Rhythm Streak Risk! days lost Ends in %1$s
Tap + to add cards or text Choose Background Add a Card GRADIENTS SOLID COLORS INTENSITY TEMPO
YOUR DATA PLAYS MINUTES UNIQUE TRACKS WEEKDAY WEEKEND Time Page A1 • Music Section TEMPO VANGUARD EARLY ADOPTER (FOUNDER) ACCESS PASS SCAN FOR ACCESS Tempo Stats Photo: Archive From Archive Restored from memory
View Story
Backup & Restore GOOGLE DRIVE LOCAL BACKUP Connect Google Account Backup to Drive Auto-backup Wi-Fi Only Only backup when connected to Wi-Fi Include Local Images Backup History (%1$d) No backups found Estimated size: %1$s Export to Device Import from Device 💡 Backup Tips • Google Drive backups are automatic and encrypted\n Use a different account Last backup: %1$s
Detected Device Enable apps to track music listening. Block apps to exclude them completely. Tap + to add a custom app. Installed • Start listening to track No apps found Add App
Configure Settings Xiaomi devices aggressively kill background apps. Complete these steps to ensure Tempo works reliably. Autostart is disabled. Tempo may stop working in the background. Enable Autostart Battery Saver → No restrictions Lock App in Recent Apps Lock in Boost Speed Disable MIUI Optimizations
Spotify Integration Disconnect Spotify? This will remove all audio feature data. Your listening history will remain, but advanced stats like mood and energy analysis will no longer be available. Disconnect Connect Spotify Unlock detailed audio analysis for your music Maybe Later Connect
Mood Analysis Energy Insights Danceability Score Acoustic vs Electronic Harmonic Resonance Sonic Immersion From Spotify & notifications %1$s requires Spotify
Not enough data yet. Keep listening! Forgotten Favorite
Tip
Listen On
Cancel Save Back OK Done Continue Skip Connect
Settings Profile Language Notifications Music Tracking Background Protection Content Filtering Advanced Stats Import History Your Data Community About Tap to edit name Update Name Display Name Save Cancel Back App Language Choose your preferred language English Français Deutsch Magyar Select Language Daily Summary Get a summary of your listening each day at 8 PM Weekly Recap See your top stats every Sunday evening Achievements Get notified when you reach milestones Daily Challenge Remindersn Get notified when new daily targets are ready Manage Permissions Tempo uses notification access to detect what you\'re listening to Manage Supported Apps Choose which apps Tempo tracks ⚠️ Configure Required Settings Xiaomi Device Settings Prevent Tempo from being killed in background Filter Podcasts Exclude podcast apps and content from tracking Filter Audiobooks Exclude audiobook apps and content from tracking Connected as %1$s Tap to disconnect Connect Spotify Unlock mood tracking and audio features Spotify-API-Only Mode ON: Tracking via Spotify servers (syncs periodically) OFF: Tracking via phone notifications (real-time) Extended Audio Analysis (Experimental) Download 30s previews for detailed mood analysis (uses mobile data) Last.fm: %1$s Syncing daily Syncing weekly Import complete • Tap to manage Import from Last.fm Import your scrobble history for deeper insights Smart Merge Versions Treat Live/Remix versions as the same song for cleaner history Backup & Restore Export or import your data Clear All Data Reddit Community r/TempoStats Telegram Channel Confused Coconut GitHub Project Source code & Issue tracker Contribute Help improve Tempo Rate on Play Store Privacy Policy Version Processing… Import Options What should happen when importing data that already exists in the app? Replace Existing Skip Duplicates Clear All Data? This action cannot be undone. All your listening history and preferences will be permanently deleted. Clear Everything Disconnect Spotify? This will remove your Spotify connection. Audio features and mood tracking will no longer be available. Disconnect Successfully processed %1$d records and %2$d images
Your %1$d Spotlight This Month All-Time Stats Your Spotlight minutes That\'s over %1$d days non-stop! Your Top Artist Your Top Song Your Top Genres Your Listening Personality Listening Time min Top Artists Top Songs Top Genres
Stats No stats yet Start listening to see your top charts! Songs Artists Albums "Sort by: " Combined Score Play Count Total Time #1 Track #1 Artist #1 Album
Filter History Time Range All Time 7 Days 30 Days Last 7 Days Last 30 Days Playback Show Skipped Songs Reset Apply Filters Delete from history? This will permanently remove \"%s\" from your listening history. Delete History is empty Play some music to see it here.
From Spotify & notifications Last.fm History Imported listening history Search songs...
Song Details Merge duplicate... Delete Song Delete Song? Are you sure you want to delete this song? This will permanently delete: • The song from your library • All listening history (%d plays) • Any enriched metadata • Artist relationships This action cannot be undone. DELETE Your All-Time Favorite This is your most played song ever. Times Played Total Listening Peak Position Release Date Genre Listening Trends No data available Mood & Genre Mood Energy Estimated Energy
Artist not found Retry Artist Details Merge with... Total Plays Discovery Insight "You first discovered " " on " ". Since then, you\'ve listened for " " across " " tracks." Top Songs Unknown Album plays Top Albums
Delete Song? Are you sure you want to delete this song? This will permanently delete: • The song from your library • All listening history (%d plays) • Any enriched metadata • Artist relationships This action cannot be undone. Mood & Genre Mood Energy Genre
Your Engagement Engagement Score Full Plays of %d Avg. Completion Replays back-to-back Completion Rate Skip Rate ⏭️ Skipped %1$d time(s) before finishing ⏸️ Frequently paused (avg %1$.1f pauses/play) ⏸️ Occasionally paused ⏸️ Rarely paused 📅 Played across %1$d different sessions
Artist not found Retry Artist Details
Refresh Artist Image Rename Artist
Discovery Insight "You first discovered " " on " ". Since then, you\'ve listened for " " across " " tracks." Unknown Album
Top 1%% Artist This is one of your absolute favorites! Top 5%% Artist You listen to them more than most. Top 10%% Artist Definitely one of your top picks. Top 25%% Artist A solid part of your rotation. Top 50%% Artist You listen to them occasionally.
Ultimate Stan You\'re in the top tier of listeners! Super Fan You really love this artist. Big Fan One of your favorites. Regular Listener You listen to them quite a bit. Listener Keep listening to level up! User
%1$d unfolds in sound A sound that stays Time moves forward
January arrives quietly February keeps its distance March begins to loosen its grip April opens the year further May settles into motion June stretches the days July holds everything at once August lingers a little longer September brings edges back October sharpens the picture November turns inward December draws a line under the year
January opens wide February stays bright March begins to slow its pace April cools the edges May pulls things closer June grows quieter July holds steady August waits patiently September starts to open again October gathers momentum November expands outward December closes loudly
January marks the beginning February keeps things moving March finds its footing April continues forward May settles the pace June reaches the middle July moves past the center August carries on September looks ahead October gains clarity November prepares to close December brings the year home
Sun Chaser Moon Owl Pure Weekend Warrior Weekday Only Weekend Warrior Daily Grinder Consistent Vibez last month a couple months ago a few months ago earlier this year last year a while ago Recently The Zone The Explorer The Time Traveler The Orbiter
You ventured into the unknown with %1$d%% new music. Your top discovery was a new sound like %2$s. You ventured into the unknown with %1$d%% new music. Your top discovery was a new sound. You found comfort in your favorites %1$d%% of the time. But you still made time to discover %2$s. You found comfort in your favorites %1$d%% of the time. But you still made time for discovery. Perfectly balanced. You explored new sounds like %1$s while keeping %2$d%% of your listening grounded in favorites. Perfectly balanced. You explored new sounds while keeping %1$d%% of your listening grounded in favorites.
Music isn\'t just a hobby, it\'s your oxygen. That\'s more than most people listen in a lifetime. A steady rhythm, not background noise. You kept the vibe going strong. Quality over quantity, always.
They defined your sound this month. They defined your sound this year. They defined your sound of all time.
But one song set the tone. You clearly couldn\'t get enough of this one. The track that stuck with you. This vibe was your home base. See you next time.
Hip Hop Head Pop Icon Rock Star Metalhead R&B Soul Electronic Voyager Jazz Cat Maestro Indie Spirit Party Starter Intense Soul Peaceful Optimist Deep Thinker Dance Floor Regular Balanced Enthusiast The Explorer The Melophile
You live for the bars, the beats, and the stories. The rhythm isn\'t just in your headphones, it\'s in your walk.
You keep your finger on the pulse of what\'s trending and catchy. If it\'s a hit, you probably heard it first.
You crave raw energy and authentic sounds. Loud guitars and real drums are your love language.
You find peace in the chaos and power of heavy music. Intensity isn\'t a flaw, it\'s a requirement.
You appreciate smooth vocals and deep emotional grooves. You feel the music as much as you hear it.
You get lost in synthetic soundscapes and driving beats. The drop is your favorite destination.
You have a sophisticated ear for improvisation and complexity. You listen for the notes they don\'t play.
You value timeless beauty and complex compositions. Your playlist is a masterpiece.
You march to the beat of your own drum, preferring unique sounds. Mainstream is boring; you want something real.
You\'re all about high-energy, happy vibes that get everyone moving! You bring the energy, every single time.
You gravitate towards powerful, emotionally charged music. You feel every beat, deep down.
You prefer calm, positive music that lifts your spirits gently. Your playlist is a deep breath for the soul.
You appreciate introspective, atmospheric soundscapes. You listen to understand, not just to hear.
Rhythm is your language - you love music that moves! Standing still just isn\'t an option for you.
You enjoy a healthy mix of upbeat and chill music. You keep things perfectly in tune.
You\'re constantly hunting for fresh sounds and new artists. You don\'t loop comfort tracks. You hunt new ones.
You simply love music in all its forms, without boundaries. Good music is good music, period.
You love music. Music is your life.
Export to Device Estimated size: %s Export Backup Import from Device Select a .tempo or .json backup file Select File
Last backed up on Tracks Artists Plays Images Local Backup Options Include Artist Images Include cached local images in export No local images cached
It\'s a podcast It\'s an audiobook Remove and block Block entire artist Artist is a podcast Artist is an audiobook Remove all from source Data Overview
This Month This Year First Played Last Played Popularity Genre No data available Last.fm Imported Archive Plays From Archive Showing tracks from archive %d archive plays Block track
Merge Duplicate Delete Song Favorite Track You\'ve listened to this a lot! Times Played Total Listening Peak Position Release Date %d plays Track not found Song Details
